'''âw-dh-p-v''' ('''kawadhpevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vote|vote]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vote|vote]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-dh-p-v
|-
! Lemma
| kawadhpevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwadhpevoko|thiwadhpevoko]] || [[word:jiwadhpevoko|jiwadhpevoko]] || [[word:shiwadhpevoko|shiwadhpevoko]] || [[word:kiwadhpevoko|kiwadhpevoko]]
